div.span: Is the experience primarily knowledge Q&A + simple actions?
Maker / power user will own day-to-day changes?
Hosted runtime, evaluations, and File Search are compelling?
Long-running, multi-actor workflow with proactive nudges?
Approvals + Dataverse + Outlook fan-out cover it?
Bespoke conversation logic or deep Graph integration?
Want model-led tool use with built-in evals?
